goal: Diff-based code review in fresh context
acceptance_criteria: AC1: init.sh --sync-claude-md populates eligible sections with managed markers
AC2: init.sh without flag prompts overwrite or exit with sync instructions (interactive)
AC2b: init.sh without flag copies template when no CLAUDE.md exists
AC2c: init.sh non-interactive keeps existing file with reminder
AC3: upgrade.sh --sync-claude-md replaces managed marker content, preserves rest
AC3b: upgrade.sh without flag prints sync reminder
AC3c: upgrade.sh --sync-claude-md migrates legacy files (no markers)
AC4: User content outside managed markers preserved unchanged
AC5: Output lists per-section action with counts including skipped
AC6: Byte-identical managed sections reported as unchanged
AC7: End-of-script CLAUDE.md status line reflects full outcome
AC7b: Pre-sync backup when changes pending; aborts on failure
AC9: New tests cover all scenarios
known_risks: 2 E2E tests fail due to platform limitations (macOS script(1) PTY input + SCRIPT_DIR source always present); contract tests cover both scenarios correctly
Missing Call Chain in arch doc — integration target chosen by QA
